title: Add first-class Web UI source access surface (list/read/search + proposal-gated edits)
summary: Create a dedicated Web UI source tool surface, analogous to src/ access, so Prom can inspect and propose/edit frontend code with the same deterministic and approval-gated workflow used for backend source.
details:
## Why this change
You want Prom to access the web-ui frontend with the same confidence and governance as backend `src/` edits.

Source evidence:
- Current source tools are backend-centric: `read_source/list_source/grep_source` only target `src/` plus a tiny root allowlist (`subagent-executor.ts` read_source implementation around ~385-441).
- There is no dedicated frontend-path tool family in current tool execution definitions (`subagent-executor.ts` switch cases, `tool-builder` defs).
- Proposal/session gating already exists and is robust for protected source edits (`find_replace_source/replace_lines_source/...` gated to proposal sessions around ~443+ in `subagent-executor.ts`).

## Exact source edits
- `src/gateway/tools/defs/file-web-memory.ts`
  - Add new tool definitions for frontend/web-ui source surface:
    - `list_webui_source(path?)`
    - `read_webui_source(file, head?, tail?)`
    - `grep_webui_source(pattern, path?, glob?, case_insensitive?, context?, max_results?)`
  - Add proposal-exec-only edit tools:
    - `find_replace_webui_source`
    - `replace_lines_webui_source`
    - `insert_after_webui_source`
    - `delete_lines_webui_source`
    - `write_webui_source`
- `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts`
  - Implement resolver/gate logic for `webui` root path (deterministic, no traversal).
  - Mirror src-edit session gate behavior for web-ui edit tools (`proposal_` / `code_exec` sessions only).
  - Return consistent, line-numbered output and deterministic error messages (path not found, outside root, missing file).
- `src/gateway/prompt-context.ts`
  - Extend tool hint block so model knows when to use web-ui source tools vs backend src tools.
- `src/gateway/routes/proposals.router.ts`
  - Update proposal executor briefing text so approved proposals may include web-ui tool operations under same deterministic constraints.

## Deterministic behavior after patch
- Prom can inspect frontend code without shell hacks using deterministic tools analogous to backend source tools.
- Frontend code edits remain guarded behind proposal execution sessions only.
- Path traversal remains blocked; tools can only operate inside configured web-ui source root.
- Existing backend src tool behavior remains unchanged.

## Acceptance tests
1. Build/typecheck:
   - `npm run build` passes.
2. Read/list/search coverage:
   - `list_webui_source({path:""})` returns frontend tree root.
   - `read_webui_source({file:"..."})` returns line-numbered content.
   - `grep_webui_source(...)` returns file:line matches with limits/context.
3. Security/gating:
   - Edit tools fail in normal interactive sessions with explicit proposal-only error.
   - Edit tools succeed in proposal execution sessions.
   - Attempted `../` traversal fails with deterministic boundary error.
4. Regression:
   - Existing `read_source/list_source/grep_source` and src edit tools continue functioning unchanged.

## Risks and compatibility
- Risk: web-ui root path discovery may vary by deployment layout.
  - Mitigation: implement explicit resolver fallback order and clear error when root missing.
- Risk: additional tools enlarge tool list and may increase model choice entropy.
  - Mitigation: clear prompt-context guidance and naming symmetry with existing src tools.
- Compatibility: additive only; no removal or behavioral change to existing source tools.

affectedFiles.description: Add web-ui source read/search/edit tool definitions
Implement web-ui source tool handlers with proposal-session edit gates
Teach tool-selection policy for backend src vs web-ui source tools
Include web-ui source execution guidance in approved proposal executor prompt

estimatedImpact: Enables deterministic frontend engineering workflows with the same governance model as backend src changes; reduces friction for UI feature/debug cycles.
executorPrompt: Apply the approved web-ui source surface feature exactly: add list/read/grep + proposal-gated edit tools for frontend source, with strict root-boundary checks and deterministic errors. Keep existing src tools unchanged. Run npm run build and report exact modified files and validation results.
